arts.ttl: Liverpool's lucky escape! PSG goal is ruled out for Khvicha Kvaratskhelia's tight offside in frantic Champions League last-16 clash
arts.sum: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia's stunning strike looked to have given PSG a deserved lead in an opening half which they dominated at the Parce des Princes on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand insists Ibrahima Konate should have been sent off after Liverpool star appeared to shove PSG's Bradley Barcola when he was through on goal
arts.sum: The Reds' were caught by a cross which sent the French winger to a one-versus-one situation against Alisson.

arts.ttl: Liverpool saved TWICE by VAR against PSG as questions asked over 'outrageous' luck
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain came desperately close to taking an early lead against Liverpool in the Champions League, while one Reds star was lucky to escape a red card

arts.ttl: Liverpool SAVED in red card reprieve as pundits Rio Ferdinand and Ally McCoist left stunned in PSG clash
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konate looked dead certain to get his marching orders in the first half

arts.ttl: Video: Watch Ousmane Dembele Leave Two Liverpool Players Looking Foolish With Dribble
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembele is one of the players that Paris Saint-Germain need to be clicking if they want to secure a positive result in this first leg against Liverpool in the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. arts.ttl: David Beckham spotted at PSG vs Liverpool as superstar revels in former rival's Champions League gauntlet
arts.sum: The Man United legend was in the stands as fans scramble for a photo at the Parc des Princes

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Drops Latest on West Ham’s Efforts to Bolster Attack With PSG, Newcastle Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are looking more at Ligue 1 for talent as over the last two summer transfer windows, the capital club have landed players such as Bradley Barcola and Ousmane Dembele. Nonetheless, could the Parisians make it three straight summers where they secure talent from France’s top flight? arts.ttl: David Beckham poses for photos with fans as he watches former side PSG take on Liverpool in Paris Champions League clash
arts.sum: The former Manchester United and Real Madrid midfielder, who turns 50 in April, played for the French Champions in 2013, making a handful of appearances before retiring.

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: PSG-Liverpool, Benfica-Barcelona
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Wednesday's Champions League action as Paris Saint-Germain take on Liverpool, Benfica take on Barcelona and Bayern take on Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Liverpool BOMBSHELL: Reds made 'MONSTROUS' offer for PSG superstar
arts.sum: The Sky Italia journalist reports that Liverpool made a 'monstrous' €100m offer for Kvaratskhelia in the final days of summer 2024, just six months before he moved to PSG for €70m. The Reds face the Georgian and his new employers PSG in the Champions League on Wednesday evening and, in the build-up to the game, Italian transfer insider Gianluca di Marzio has dropped a veritable bombshell.
